meanings.usage: 指存放和借贷货币的金融机构
指固定周期内的工作报酬
指从他人处暂时取得金钱或物品，承诺归还
指把自己的金钱或物品暂时给别人使用
指货币或可用于交换的资产
表示意外或突如其来的感觉
描述动作在时间上没有延迟
指付钱以换取商品或服务
指一天中的主餐，通常在晚上进行
指用于放置物品或用餐的家具
表示正在进行的工作或职业状态
指过去的某个时间段，距今较久
表示某动作从未发生或不存在

phrases.usage: 用于表达到目前为止从未进行过借入的动作

examples.en: He has never borrowed money from me.

phrases.usage: 用于引出令人惊讶的情况

examples.en: To my surprise, he gave me the money immediately.
examples.zh: 令我惊讶的是，他立刻把钱给了我。

phrases.usage: 指为晚餐付款，承担晚餐费用

examples.en: Now you can pay for my dinner!
examples.zh: 现在你可以为我的晚餐付账了！

phrases.usage: 请求对方借给自己二十英镑

examples.en: I asked him to lend me twenty pounds.
examples.zh: 我请他借给我二十英镑。

phrases.phrase: come and sit at the same table
phrases.usage: 表示来到并坐在同一张桌子旁

examples.en: Tony saw me and came and sat at the same table.
examples.zh: 托尼看见我后走过来坐在同一张桌子旁。

phrases.phrase: worked in a lawyer's office years ago
phrases.usage: 描述多年前在律师事务所工作

examples.en: He worked in a lawyer's office years ago.
examples.zh: 他多年前在一家律师事务所工作。

examples.en: He gets a good salary, but he always borrows money.
examples.zh: 他薪水不错，但他总是向朋友借钱。

phrases.phrase: borrows money from his friends and never pays it back
phrases.usage: 描述向朋友借钱且不归还的行为

examples.en: He always borrows money from his friends and never pays it back.
examples.zh: 他总是向朋友借钱且从不归还。

phrases.usage: 表示在进食的同时进行另一动作

examples.en: While he was eating, I asked him to lend me twenty pounds.
examples.zh: 在他吃饭的时候，我请他借给我二十英镑。

phrases.phrase: so now you can pay for my dinner
phrases.usage: 用于因果关系，得出结论

examples.en: I have never borrowed any money from you, so now you can pay for my dinner!
examples.zh: 我从未向你借过钱，所以现在你可以为我付晚餐了！

grammar.title: 现在完成时与否定式 (has/have never + 过去分词)
grammar.definition: 使用 have/has + never + 过去分词 表示到目前为止从未经历某事
grammar.usage: 用于强调某动作从未发生，否定意义强烈

examples.en: He has never borrowed money from me.
I have never been to Paris.

grammar.title: 过去进行时 + when 引导的一般过去时 (was/were doing ... when ... did)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某个时刻正在进行的动作被另一动作中断或同时发生
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 动词‑ing + when + 主语 + 动词过去式
grammar.usage: 用来描述一个进行中的动作，另一个短暂动作在同一时间点发生

examples.en: I was having dinner at a restaurant when Tony Steele came in.
examples.zh: 我正在餐厅吃晚饭时，托尼·斯蒂尔走了进来。

examples.en: She was reading when the phone rang.
examples.zh: 她正在看书时电话响了。

grammar.title: used to + 动词原形 (过去习惯或状态)
grammar.definition: 表示过去常常做某事或过去处于某种状态，而现在不再如此
grammar.usage: 用于回忆过去的习惯或状态，常与 now/nowadays 对比

examples.en: Tony worked in a lawyer's office years ago, but now he is working at a bank.
examples.zh: 托尼多年前在律师事务所工作，但现在在银行工作。

examples.en: He used to smoke a lot.

original.en: I was having dinner at a restaurant when Tony Steele came in.
original.zh: 我正在餐厅吃晚饭时，托尼·斯蒂尔走了进来。

imitations.en: I was reading a book when the doorbell rang.
imitations.zh: 我正在看书时门铃响了。

imitations.en: She was cooking dinner when the power went out.

original.en: He has never borrowed money from me.

imitations.en: She has never missed a class.

original.en: To my surprise, he gave me the money immediately.
original.zh: 令我惊讶的是，他立刻把钱给了我。

imitations.en: To my surprise, the exam was cancelled.
imitations.zh: 令我惊讶的是，考试取消了。

imitations.en: To her surprise, he remembered her birthday.
imitations.zh: 令她惊讶的是，他记住了她的生日。

original.en: I have never borrowed any money from you, so now you can pay for my dinner!
original.zh: 我从未向你借过钱，所以现在你可以为我付晚餐了！

imitations.en: You have never helped me, so now you can lend me a hand.
imitations.zh: 你从未帮助过我，所以现在你可以帮我一把。

imitations.en: She has never asked for a favor, so now you can do her a favor.
imitations.zh: 她从未请求过帮忙，所以现在你可以帮她一个忙。
